<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Equality; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractMutator; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BinaryOp\Equal; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BinaryOp\NotEqual; class NotEqualToEqual extends AbstractMutator { public const SET = 'Equality'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Converts the not equal operator to the equal operator.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' if ($a != $b) { // [tl! remove] if ($a == $b) { // [tl! add] // ... } DIFF; public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [NotEqual::class]; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { /** @var NotEqual $node */ return new Equal($node->left, $node->right, $node->getAttributes()); } }
